data.title: NAR Existing-Home Sales Report Shows 1.7% Increase in February
data.description: According to the Existing-Home Sales report by the National Association of REALTORS®, in February there was a 1.7% month-over-month rise in existing-home sales, indicating positive growth in the real estate market. This report serves as a valuable source of information for various stakeholders in the real estate industry, offering insights on home sales volume, pricing trends, and available inventory. This data gives agents, homebuyers, and sellers crucial information to make informed decisions in the real estate market.

data.title: Leverage Shares by Themes Debuts WLDU, Delivering 2X Global Equity Exposure, and GLWG Single-Stock ETF
data.description: On March 10, 2026, in Greenwich, Leverage Shares by Themes introduced two novel 2X leveraged ETFs, which can be traded starting on the same day. These ETFs target active traders looking for innovative investment opportunities with high growth potential. The aim of the new ETFs is to assist investors in magnifying returns in both bullish and bearish market conditions, enabling them to actively engage with daily market movements.

data.title: United Corporations Limited Announces Renewal of Normal Course Issuer Bid
data.description: Today, United Corporations Limited (TSX: UNC) revealed its plans to renew its Normal Course Issuer Bid (the “Bid”) through the Toronto Stock Exchange and other Canadian trading systems. The company disclosed that the Exchange has approved their notice to proceed with the Bid. This move signifies the Company's intention to repurchase some of its outstanding common shares and preferred shares, including UNC.PR.A, UNC.PR.B, and UNC.PR.C. It is an opportunity for the Company to buy back a substantial number of its shares, which can impact its stock performance and overall market value.

data.title: E-L Financial Corporation Limited Announces Renewal of Normal Course Issuer Bid
data.description: In Toronto on March 10, 2026, E-L Financial Corporation Limited (TSX: ELF) revealed its plans to renew its Normal Course Issuer Bid. The bid, accepted by the Toronto Stock Exchange, will allow the company to repurchase a certain number of its outstanding common shares. The bid will be conducted on the Exchange as well as other Canadian trading systems. The company's intention to proceed with the renewal underscores its commitment to leveraging its financial strength for strategic investments. The acceptance of the bid by the Exchange indicates confidence in the company's financial stability and growth prospects.

data.title: Economic Investment Trust Limited Announces Renewal of Normal Course Issuer Bid
data.description: On March 10, 2026, Economic Investment Trust Limited (TSX: EVT) disclosed its plan to renew its Normal Course Issuer Bid through the Toronto Stock Exchange. The Exchange has approved the Company's notice of intent to proceed with the Bid, which will involve repurchasing a yet-to-be-determined amount of its common shares. This initiative will be carried out via the Exchange or alternative Canadian trading platforms.

data.title: LyondellBasell to address 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
data.description: LyondellBasell, a prominent figure in the chemical sector, revealed that Agustin Izquierdo, the executive vice president and CFO, will engage in a fireside chat at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference in Washington, D.C. This event is scheduled for Tuesday, March 17, 2026, at 3:40 p.m. EDT. The company's stock is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol LYB.

data.title: Amplify ETFs Launches Amplify Municipal CEF High Income ETF (YYYM)
data.description: Amplify ETFs, a prominent provider of innovative ETF solutions, revealed the introduction of the Amplify Municipal CEF High Income ETF (YYYM) today.

data.title: The "Brain" Enters the Water: iGarden X Series Debuts as the World’s First AI-Empowered Swim Jet
data.description: In San Francisco, the iGarden Swim Jet X Series has been revealed as the first AI-powered portable swim jet globally. This innovative product was introduced on Kickstarter on March 12th at 9:00 AM PDT, signifying a significant change in applying high-output propulsion to home settings. During the initial 48 hours of the launch, there is a special offer - one fortunate supporter who pledges within this timeframe will be chosen at random to receive a free X Series unit from their order.
Stantec renews Normal Course Issuer Bid and Automatic Share Purchase Plan to buy back up to X shares.

data.title: Olto Expands Its Product-Trained AI Agents With Hexus AI to Cover Product Videos, Interactive Demos, and Onboarding How-To Guides
data.description: Today in San Francisco, Olto revealed its acquisition of Hexus AI's core technology, IP, and product roadmap. This move integrates Hexus AI’s offerings into Olto’s platform, resulting in a unified platform of product-trained AI agents for revenue teams. These agents are specialized in understanding the product, buyers, and the specific information needed by individuals at various stages of the sales process. The agents cover the entire customer journey from initial interaction to sales, adoption, and renewal. This strategic acquisition enhances Olto’s capabilities significantly.

data.title: Rebar Closes $14M Series A Led by Prudence to Rapidly Scale its AI Platform for HVAC, Electrical and Plumbing Industries
data.description: In New York, Rebar, a vertical AI platform focused on the HVAC, Electrical, and Plumbing sectors, recently finalized a $14 million Series A funding round. Prudence, a venture firm backing vertical AI companies shaping the built world's global evolution, spearheaded the funding, joined by Zero Infinity Partners, Founder Collective, Villain Capital, and Optimist Ventures. Rebar's exclusive vertical AI system is set to revolutionize operations in these industries.

data.title: "FP&A Software is Dead" Leading FP&A Software Provider Datarails Declares, Introducing the Finance Operating System for the AI Era
data.description: In a recent announcement from New York, a prominent FP&A software provider, Datarails, has made a bold declaration regarding the industry landscape. They proclaimed that traditional FP&A software is now obsolete due to the evolving needs of AI-driven finance teams. These teams now require enhanced speed, flexibility, and the capacity to utilize modern AI tools - requirements that conventional closed enterprise software fails to meet.Datarails has introduced FinanceOS, an innovative financial operating system designed to cater to these changing demands. This platform offers companies the capability to streamline and gather all their financial and operational data onto a single platform. This strategic move signifies a shift towards more advanced AI-integrated solutions within the finance sector.

data.title: Stephens Group elevates Jens Talbert and Blake Tilley to Principal roles in exciting move.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the economy grew by 4.3% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. Additionally, the unemployment rate dropped to 3.9%, the lowest in five years. The stock market saw a significant increase, with the main index rising by 7% in just one week. Analysts attribute this growth to increased consumer spending and a boost in business investments. The government announced plans to further stimulate the economy by implementing new tax cuts and infrastructure projects. Experts predict this trend will continue in the coming months, leading to even more growth and prosperity.

data.title: Horizon Quantum Delivers Achievements that Demonstrate Company’s Momentum in the Quantum Industry
data.description: Singapore-based Horizon Quantum Computing Pte. Ltd., a leader in quantum applications software infrastructure, has reached significant milestones in preparation for its merger with dMY Squared Technology Group, Inc. (OTC: “DMYY”, “DMYYU” and “DMYYW”). The company has made notable advancements in operations and governance, solidifying its position for the proposed business combination.

data.title: Smart Glasses, Rebuilt for Privacy: Brilliant Labs, Neuphonic & TheStage AI Move AI Off the Cloud
data.description: In London, three companies - Brilliant Labs, Neuphonic, and TheStage AI - have joined forces in a strategic collaboration to advance cutting-edge AI technology in wearables while avoiding the issues of latency and privacy breaches associated with cloud computing. The current reliance on cloud-hosted models for AI inference, like audio and image analysis, introduces delays and potential risks of data exposure. This partnership aims to address these concerns by shifting processing to consumer hardware, safeguarding crucial point-of-view data and enhancing user privacy.

data.title: Judge denies RICO claims in pastor-led crypto fraud case. Eddy Alexandre, guilty of commodities fraud, gets nine-year sentence.
data.description: Eddy Alexandre admitted guilt in a commodities fraud case in 2023 and is now serving a nine-year prison term.
